Name: Main On-Board Computer
Description: ARM Cortex-A9 dual-core + Xilinx Kintex-7 FPGA (XC7K160T), space-qualified, 4 GB DDR3 ECC RAM, 256 MB NOR flash, FreeRTOS/cFS. Handles SAR range compression, image pre-processing, data routing. Radiation tolerant ≥ 30 krad TID.

Name: AI Accelerator Module
Product Name: NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX (16 GB) - Space Modified
Description: COTS (space-modified with shielding). 100 TOPS (INT8) performance for onboard AI inference. Shielded in 2mm aluminum vault + 0.5mm tantalum. Target ≤ 10 krad TID.

Name: Mass Storage Flash Module
Description: 512 GB to 1 TB radiation-hardened NAND flash storage with hardware SECDED. FIFO ring buffer for raw imagery, priority queue for AI alerts. ≥ 100,000 write cycles.

Name: Optical Focal Plane Array Detector
Description: Back-side illuminated (BSI) CMOS, scientific grade. ≥ 9000 × 6000 pixels, 5.0–7.0 μm pixel pitch. PAN, Blue, Green, Red, NIR spectral channels. ≥ 30 fps burst, TDI mode.

Name: SAR Transceiver Electronics
Product Name: Custom X-band SAR Electronics (GaN SSPA, LNA, DDS, ADC)
Description: X-Band (9.6 GHz) radar system including GaN SSPA (20-40W peak RF), LNA (NF ≤ 2.5dB), DDS (AD9914 or equiv.), 12-bit ≥1 Gsps ADC, and TCXO (≤ 1 ppb stability). Handles LFM chirp waveform generation and raw data sampling. Onboard range compression.

Name: Deployable SAR Patch Antenna
Description: 500mm × 300mm deployed aperture, 8 × 16 (128 elements) patch array. ≥ 28 dBi gain. Electronic beam steering (±30° azimuth) via 4-bit phase shifters per element. RF connection via flexible coaxial harness.

Name: Star Tracker (+Y Panel)
Product Name: Blue Canyon Technologies NST or Sinclair Interplanetary ST-16RT2
Description: Primary star tracker for high-accuracy attitude knowledge. ≥ 4 Hz update rate, ≤ 5 arcsec (3σ) knowledge, ≥ 10° × 10° FOV, lost-in-space capable. Mounted on +Y panel.

Name: Star Tracker (-Y Panel)
Product Name: Blue Canyon Technologies NST or Sinclair Interplanetary ST-16RT2
Description: Redundant star tracker for high-accuracy attitude knowledge. ≥ 4 Hz update rate, ≤ 5 arcsec (3σ) knowledge, ≥ 10° × 10° FOV, lost-in-space capable. Mounted on -Y panel.

Name: IMU / Gyroscope
Product Name: Analog Devices ADIS16480 (or MEMS FOG equivalent)
Description: High-frequency attitude data. ARW ≤ 0.003°/√hr, Bias stability ≤ 1°/hr. 100 Hz update rate.

Name: Coarse Sun Sensor (+X Face)
Description: Used for initial acquisition and safe-mode attitude hold.

Name: Coarse Sun Sensor (-X Face)
Description: Used for initial acquisition and safe-mode attitude hold.

Name: Coarse Sun Sensor (+Y Face)
Description: Used for initial acquisition and safe-mode attitude hold.

Name: Coarse Sun Sensor (-Y Face)
Description: Used for initial acquisition and safe-mode attitude hold.

Name: Coarse Sun Sensor (+Z Face)
Description: Used for initial acquisition and safe-mode attitude hold.

Name: Coarse Sun Sensor (-Z Face)
Description: Used for initial acquisition and safe-mode attitude hold.

Name: Fine Sun Sensor (+Z Face)
Description: Provides precise solar tracking data, mounted on +Z face.

Name: Magnetometer 1
Description: Used for momentum desaturation scheduling with magnetorquers.

Name: Magnetometer 2
Description: Redundant magnetometer for momentum desaturation scheduling.

Name: Reaction Wheel 1
Description: Provides attitude control torque. ≥ 30 mNm·s angular momentum, ≥ 0.5 mNm torque. Part of pyramid configuration.

Name: Reaction Wheel 2
Description: Provides attitude control torque. ≥ 30 mNm·s angular momentum, ≥ 0.5 mNm torque. Part of pyramid configuration.

Name: Reaction Wheel 3
Description: Provides attitude control torque. ≥ 30 mNm·s angular momentum, ≥ 0.5 mNm torque. Part of pyramid configuration.

Name: Reaction Wheel 4 (Redundant)
Description: Redundant reaction wheel for attitude control. Skewed 54.7° from Z-axis. ≥ 30 mNm·s angular momentum, ≥ 0.5 mNm torque.

Name: Magnetorquer X-axis
Description: Used for desaturation of reaction wheels and safe-mode detumbling. Dipole moment ≥ 0.3 A·m².

Name: Magnetorquer Y-axis
Description: Used for desaturation of reaction wheels and safe-mode detumbling. Dipole moment ≥ 0.3 A·m².

Name: Magnetorquer Z-axis
Description: Used for desaturation of reaction wheels and safe-mode detumbling. Dipole moment ≥ 0.3 A·m².

Name: ADCS Controller Board
Description: Dedicated board for ADCS algorithms. Runs EKF at 100 Hz, PD control for fine pointing, and B-dot detumble algorithm. Interfaces with all ADCS sensors and actuators.

Name: Power Conditioning & Distribution Unit
Product Name: GomSpace NanoPower P60 or DHV Technology EPS-R
Description: Manages power from solar arrays and battery. Unregulated 28V primary bus. Provides regulated 12V/5A, 5V/6A, 3.3V/4A rails. 28V pass-through rails (5A for SAR/X-Band, 3A for Jetson). Per-panel MPPT. Overcurrent protection (eFuse, latching relay).

Name: Li-ion Battery Pack
Product Name: GomSpace BPX / Saft MP176065 / EaglePicher LCB
Description: 100–150 Wh Li-ion battery pack, 7.4V (2S) or 14.8V (4S) nominal voltage. Operational SOC 20%-90%. Cell temperature monitoring.

Name: Deployable Solar Array Panel 1
Description: GaAs triple-junction solar cells (XTJ-Prime or equivalent) with ≥ 30% efficiency. CFRP substrate, CMX coverglass. Contributes to ~80W BOL total power.

Name: Deployable Solar Array Panel 2
Description: GaAs triple-junction solar cells (XTJ-Prime or equivalent) with ≥ 30% efficiency. CFRP substrate, CMX coverglass. Contributes to ~80W BOL total power.

Name: Deployable Solar Array Panel 3
Description: GaAs triple-junction solar cells (XTJ-Prime or equivalent) with ≥ 30% efficiency. CFRP substrate, CMX coverglass. Contributes to ~80W BOL total power.

Name: Deployable Solar Array Panel 4
Description: GaAs triple-junction solar cells (XTJ-Prime or equivalent) with ≥ 30% efficiency. CFRP substrate, CMX coverglass. Contributes to ~80W BOL total power.

Name: Fixed Body-Mounted Solar Panel 5
Description: Body-mounted GaAs triple-junction solar cells. Contributes to ~80W BOL total power.

Name: Fixed Body-Mounted Solar Panel 6
Description: Body-mounted GaAs triple-junction solar cells. Contributes to ~80W BOL total power.

Name: X-Band High-Rate Transmitter
Product Name: Syrlinks EWC27 or Tethers Unlimited SWIFT-XTS
Description: 8.0–8.4 GHz, 150 Mbps (QPSK, rate 7/8 turbo code), 5 W RF output power. Downlinks imagery and AI alert packets. AES-256 encryption.

Name: X-Band Phased Array Antenna
Description: Fixed nadir-pointing 4-element patch phased array. ~10 dBi gain, ±25° HPBW. Connected to X-Band transmitter.

Name: S-Band TT&C Transceiver Module
Description: 2.025–2.110 GHz uplink, 2.200–2.290 GHz downlink. 9.6 kbps uplink, 256 kbps downlink. 1 W RF output. CCSDS TC/TM Space Packet Protocol. For telemetry, tracking & commanding.

Name: S-Band Patch Antenna (+Z Face)
Description: Provides full-sphere S-Band coverage, mounted on +Z face.

Name: S-Band Patch Antenna (-Z Face)
Description: Provides full-sphere S-Band coverage, mounted on -Z face.

Name: Battery Heater Mat 1
Description: 2W thermostatically controlled Kapton heater mat for battery pack. Activates if battery temperature falls below 5°C.

Name: Battery Heater Mat 2
Description: 2W thermostatically controlled Kapton heater mat for battery pack. Activates if battery temperature falls below 5°C.

Description: Pyro-free SMA actuator for deploying the SAR antenna. Dual-redundant command paths, arm+fire sequence.

Name: 12U CubeSat Chassis Structure
Description: Primary structural frame for the 12U CubeSat (226x226x340mm), 6U upper payload bay, 6U lower bus bay. Made of Aluminum alloy 7075-T6. PC/104 and CDS Rev 14 compliant.

Name: CFRP Optical Bench Plate
Description: Carbon-fiber reinforced polymer optical bench plate for athermal telescope mounting. Isolates thermal distortion via bipod flexure mounts.

Name: High-Stress Titanium Brackets
Description: Grade 5 Titanium (Ti-6Al-4V) brackets for high-stress interfaces, e.g., securing payloads or ADCS components.

Name: Solar Array Hinge Assembly 1
Description: Spring-loaded hinge assembly for deploying solar panel 1. Designed to survive 14.1 g_rms random vibration.

Name: Solar Array Hinge Assembly 2
Description: Spring-loaded hinge assembly for deploying solar panel 2. Designed to survive 14.1 g_rms random vibration.

Name: Solar Array Hinge Assembly 3
Description: Spring-loaded hinge assembly for deploying solar panel 3. Designed to survive 14.1 g_rms random vibration.

Name: Solar Array Hinge Assembly 4
Description: Spring-loaded hinge assembly for deploying solar panel 4. Designed to survive 14.1 g_rms random vibration.

Name: SAR Antenna Deployment Hinge
Description: Torsion spring hinge for SAR antenna deployment, designed to be fail-safe (deployed configuration).

Name: CubeSat Spring Ejector Interface
Description: Standardized interface for deployment from common CubeSat ejectors.

Name: Passive Radiator Panel (-Z Face)
Description: Dedicated passive radiator panel on the -Z face for focal plane cooling. Black anodized surface for optimal radiation.

Name: MLI Blankets (Telescope Barrel)
Description: Multi-Layer Insulation blankets to cover the telescope barrel for thermal control.

Name: MLI Blankets (SAR Electronics)
Description: Multi-Layer Insulation blankets to cover the SAR electronics for thermal control.

Name: Optical Solar Reflector (+X Face)
Description: Optical Solar Reflector panel on +X face for passive thermal control.

Name: Optical Solar Reflector (-X Face)
Description: Optical Solar Reflector panel on -X face for passive thermal control.

Name: Telescope Barrel
Description: CFRP barrel for the TMA telescope, providing athermal performance (CTE < 1 × 10^-6 /°C).

Name: TMA Primary Mirror (M1)
Description: First freeform mirror of the Three-Mirror Anastigmat (TMA) telescope. Aluminum substrate with electroless nickel plating + protected gold coating. Primary aperture diameter ≥ 200 mm.

Name: TMA Secondary Mirror (M2)
Description: Second freeform mirror of the TMA telescope. Aluminum substrate with electroless nickel plating + protected gold coating.

Name: TMA Tertiary Mirror (M3)
Description: Third freeform mirror of the TMA telescope. Aluminum substrate with electroless nickel plating + protected gold coating.

Name: Telescope Baffles & Light Stops
Description: Internal baffling and knife-edge light stops within the telescope barrel for stray light rejection (≥ 10^-6 veiling glare index).

Name: FPA Conduction Strap
Description: Conduction strap for passive cooling of the Focal Plane Assembly to the -Z radiator panel.

Name: AI Accelerator Aluminum Vault
Description: 2 mm thick aluminum vault enclosing the Jetson Orin NX for radiation shielding.

Name: AI Accelerator Tantalum Spot Shielding
Description: 0.5 mm tantalum spot shielding over critical logic components of the Jetson Orin NX.

Name: PC/104 Stacking Spacers
Description: Standoffs for stacking PC/104 compliant boards within the CubeSat chassis.

Name: M2.5 Fasteners (Internal)
Description: General purpose M2.5 fasteners for internal component mounting.

Name: M3 Fasteners (Chassis/Panels)
Description: General purpose M3 fasteners for chassis panels and structural elements.

Name: Mechanical Deployment Inhibits
Description: Three mechanical inhibits to prevent unintended deployment before launch, as per CSLI safety requirements.

Name: Harness Cable Ties
Description: Cable ties for securing internal power and signal harnesses.

Name: Harness Routing Troughs
Description: Custom 3D printed troughs to separate power, signal, and RF harnesses, maintaining minimum 25mm separation.

Name: 28V Unregulated Power Bus
Description: Distributes unregulated 28V power to connected components.

Name: 12V Regulated Power Bus
Description: Distributes regulated 12V power to connected components.

Name: 5V Regulated Power Bus
Description: Distributes regulated 5V power to connected components.

Name: 3.3V Regulated Power Bus
Description: Distributes regulated 3.3V power to connected components.
